A

apply(String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.utils.MsgFmt
Substitutes placeholders without value transformation.
apply(String, Function<String, String>, Object...) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.utils.MsgFmt
Substitutes placeholders, transforming each replacement value through valueTransformer before insertion.
args(Object...) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.utils.MsgFmt
Convenience overload: returns a builder-style argument list from key/value pairs.
async() - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Default async executor (CPU by default).
Audience - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
Minimal recipient abstraction for platform-agnostic messaging.
AudienceResolver - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
Normalizes "any sender-like object" into an Audience.

newSingleThreadScheduler(String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskSchedulers
Creates a single-thread ScheduledExecutorService with a named daemon thread.

Returns a no-op subscription for unsupported platforms/capabilities.
NOOP - Static variable in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ListenerSubscription
A no-op listener subscription that does nothing when closed.

onPlayerLocale(PlayerLocale) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.PlayerLocaleListener

onPlayerMessage(PlayerMessage) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.PlayerMessageListener

P

Platform - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
Abstraction over runtime platform (Bukkit, Fabric, NeoForge, etc.).
PlatformLogger - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
Platform-friendly logger facade to avoid binding to a specific implementation.

Normalized player lifecycle transition observed by the platform layer.

PlayerLocaleListener - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform

PlayerMessage - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform

PlayerMessageListener - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform

Runs a task asynchronously and returns a future.
runAsync(Runnable) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Run a task on the default async executor.
runCpu(Runnable) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Run a task on the CPU executor.
runForAudience(Audience, Runnable) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform

runIo(Runnable) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Run a task on the IO executor.
runOnMain(Platform, Runnable) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Tasks
Runs a task on the main thread and returns a future.
runOnMain(Runnable) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform
Executes a task on the main thread.

schedule(Runnable, long, TimeUnit) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedScheduler

scheduleAtFixedRate(Runnable, long, long, TimeUnit) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedScheduler
Schedules a task at a fixed rate.

scheduler() - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Scheduler for delayed tasks.
scheduler(Platform) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Tasks
Resolves the scheduler for a platform (shared fallback when null).
scheduleWithFixedDelay(Runnable, long, long, TimeUnit) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedScheduler
Schedules a task with a fixed delay between completion and next start.
send(Component) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience
Sends a formatted component to the audience.
shared() - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskSchedulers
Returns the shared scheduler instance.
shutdown() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedExecutor
Shuts down the backing executor, attempting orderly termination first.
shutdown() - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Shutdown all executors.
ShutdownHookRegistrar - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
Optional platform hook for lifecycle shutdown events.
shutdownNow() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedExecutor
Immediately shuts down the backing executor.
subscribePlayerLifecycle(PlayerLifecycleListener) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform
Subscribes to normalized player join/leave events when the platform supports it.
subscribePlayerLocales(PlayerLocaleListener) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform
Subscribes to normalized player locale updates when the platform supports it.
subscribePlayerMessages(PlayerMessageListener) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform
Subscribes to normalized player chat/command messages when the platform supports it.
supplyAsync(Supplier<T>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ManagedExecutor
Supplies a value asynchronously and returns a future.
supplyAsync(Supplier<T>) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Supply a value on the default async executor.
supplyCpu(Supplier<T>) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Supply a value on the CPU executor.
supplyIo(Supplier<T>) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.TaskScheduler
Supply a value on the IO executor.

T

Tasks - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform
